decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly dropping artifacts onto the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal, Mishra's Bauble, and Engineered Explosives, the deck aims to create a wide board presence and apply pressure on the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Urza's Saga and Emry, Lurker of the Loch allows for additional value and recursion of key artifacts. The goal is to outpace the opponent and close out the game before they can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and using burn spells to control the board. The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with abilities that can deal damage directly to the opponent, such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. Additionally, cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional ways to deal damage and win the game quickly. The deck also includes cards like Elegant Parlor and Thraben Charm for extra control and versatility.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient artifacts. By combining artifact synergies and powerful cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal, the deck can quickly establish a strong board presence and maintain pressure on the opponent. Using cards like Claws of Gix and Metallic Rebuke, the deck can disrupt the opponent's game plan while also protecting its own threats. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides additional value by recurring artifacts from the graveyard, keeping the pressure on the opponent throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and generating value through sacrificing artifacts. By utilizing cards like Krang, Master Mind and Ravenous Robots, the deck can apply pressure on opponents while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt. The synergy between artifacts and sacrifice outlets such as Claws of Gix and Arcbound Ravager allows for explosive plays and staying one step ahead of the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells.

This Aggro - Affinity deck focuses on maximizing the benefits of artifacts by quickly establishing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with efficient and powerful plays. With a mix of low-cost artifacts and cards that synergize with artifacts, the deck aims to rapidly build a threatening army while disrupting the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble, Urza's Saga, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck can generate card advantage and generate repeated value from its artifacts, leading to explosive and overwhelming wins.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It includes cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to deal damage quickly, while utilizing cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Guide of Souls for creature support. The deck also includes some disruption elements like Goblin Bombardment and Static Prison to control the board. Overall, the strategy is to apply early pressure and maintain aggression throughout the game to secure a quick victory.

This deck combines aggressive creatures with disruptive elements, aiming to put pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. The deck utilizes efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Teferi, Time Raveler and Quantum Riddler provide disruption by bouncing opponents' permanents and stripping their hand of resources. The deck also includes removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful control spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan while leveraging card advantage and incremental advantage through cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Teferi, Time Raveler. The deck aims to control the board state, counter key spells, and ultimately win the game through either out-valuing the opponent or locking them out of the game entirely. The deck also has a few win conditions in the form of creatures like Solitude and finishers like Monumental Henge and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury.

This deck focuses on assembling a versatile toolbox of creatures to take advantage of various synergies and combos. It includes a variety of creatures with different abilities and uses Green Sun's Zenith to search for the right creature for any situation. Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician provide additional value by sacrificing creatures for benefit. The deck also includes some utility lands like Underground Mortuary and Boseiju, Who Endures to support its strategy. The goal is to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent by utilizing the creatures in the deck effectively.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Solitude and Overlord of the Balemurk. The deck also has ways to protect its own creatures with Ephemerate and Flickerwisp, as well as card advantage engines like Witch Enchanter and Quantum Riddler. The addition of powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler adds another dimension to the deck's disruption strategy. Overall, this deck aims to control the game tempo while constantly applying pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Phelia and Phlage to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge. Teferi, Time Raveler is used to control the opponent's spells and give the deck additional flexibility. Arena of Glory can provide extra damage and protection for the creatures, while Quantum Riddler and Meticulous Archive help with card advantage and consistency. Overall, the deck aims to win the game quickly by overwhelming the opponent with its powerful creatures and disruption spells.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures like Vengevine and Hollow One to quickly put pressure on the opponent. Burning Inquiry and Faithless Looting help to cycle through the deck and get key cards into the graveyard. Lightning Bolt provides removal while Marauding Mako and Detective's Phoenix provide additional threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive plays and capitalize on the synergy between the creatures and graveyard recursion. Masked Meower and Moonshadow provide additional support and versatility to the strategy.

This deck focuses on assembling a combo involving Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant to quickly put pressure on the opponent. The deck includes a variety of cards to search for and protect the combo pieces, such as Eldritch Evolution, Neoform, and Summoner's Pact. Other cards like Nourishing Shoal and Veil of Summer provide additional protection and disruption against opponents. The deck aims to quickly set up a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. The deck also utilizes cards like Orim's Chant and Isochron Scepter for added control. With the addition of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion, the deck gains a powerful creature that can provide additional support. The deck aims to stall the game, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and ultimately win through card advantage and powerful threats.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Phlage, and Ocelot Pride, supported by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to close out games. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides anthem effects to boost the team's power, while Ranger-Captain of Eos searches for key creatures. Seasoned Pyromancer helps with card advantage and board presence, while Mana Tithe and Thraben Charm offer disruption against opponents. Various lands provide mana fixing and utility, while Arena of Glory helps protect and pump up the team. Static Prison also helps control opposing strategies.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells while maintaining control of the battlefield. By using cards like Ajani, Guide of Souls, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and deal damage quickly. Cards like Goblin Bombardment and Seasoned Pyromancer provide additional removal and damage potential, while cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Voice of Victory offer utility and protection for key creatures. The mana base is built to support a mix of white and red spells, allowing for a versatile and dynamic playstyle.
